description: This bird was originally found at Cherry Creek State Park in Arapahoe County on 4/15 by Buzz Schaumberg. It continued at Cherry Creek on 4/16 in the morning, but took off to the west by late morning. This morning (4/17) I found the bird in the bay off Kingfisher lot. Renee Cassias was also present at the time, and more observers showed up after we got word out. It eventually moved east, where it was obscured by trees. However, viewing was still decent from the wildlife viewing platform in Douglas County. Large, brown waterbird with large bill and whitish head. MUCH smaller than American White Pelicans it was associating with.
